arts.ttl: Arsenal handed a major boost as Barcelona 'drop out of the race' to sign summer target Nico Williams
arts.sum: Arsenal will bolster their attack ahead of next season, having seen a shortage of forwards derail their title charge this term - and Mikel Arteta is said to be a huge admirer of Williams.

arts.ttl: Araujo determined to prove critics wrong at Barca
arts.sum: His start against Dortmund came only because Flick was protecting Inigo Martinez, who was a booking away from suspension, meaning he’s likely to be back on the bench against on Saturday against Celta. The defender is said to have a great relationship with Hansi Flick and remains totally committed to Barcelona.
